response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates extensive full-stack development experience with a strong focus on TypeScript, Node.js, and modern frameworks like React. His background in AI-agent infrastructure, developer tooling, and enterprise-scale systems aligns well with the role's requirements. His open-source contributions and leadership in workshops further highlight his technical depth and collaborative mindset.
strengths: 10+ years of full-stack development experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React, matching the primary stack.
Proven track record in AI-agent development and internal tooling, directly relevant to the role.
Strong open-source contributions and community engagement, demonstrating technical leadership and collaboration.
concerns: Limited explicit mention of Nest.js, a key framework in the job description.
Experience with Kotlin/Java is secondary, though present in earlier roles.
German language skills are basic, which may impact collaboration in a Berlin-based team.
